overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a Medjay character ascending a rocky hillside construction site with wooden fortifications. The character moves through scaffolding and stone corridors before reaching an open platform overlooking a body of water and distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky hillside approach with wooden scaffolding

agents.ego_description: walking steadily uphill on the rocky slope toward the wooden fortification

notable_agents.action: guard standing watch near wooden beams on the right side of the path

entered.detail: reddish-brown rocky dirt path with scattered stones
rough timber scaffolding and support beams along the left side
large white fabric tent structure with rope bindings
tall wooden tower with red canopy roof at the hilltop
rocky desert mountain formations in the background

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a rocky hillside path surrounded by wooden scaffolding and construction materials. A white canvas tent sits to the left while a wooden watchtower with a red canopy stands at the hilltop ahead. The terrain is arid with reddish-brown rocks under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: fortification entrance with wooden towers and red banners

events.description: approaching the wooden gate structure marking the fortification entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing through the outer wooden fortification gate

notable_agents.action: worker carrying materials near the stone wall on the right

entered.detail: large timber gate with vertical posts marking the fort entrance
rough-hewn stone block wall under construction on the right
red fabric flags hanging from the wooden tower structure

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the wooden fortification gate, passing stone walls and construction materials. Red banners hang from the timber towers ahead. The ground transitions from loose dirt to packed earth as the character enters the fortified area.

scene_state.functional_zone: fortified stone corridor between high walls

events.description: entering narrow stone corridor between high walls, transitioning from open terrain to enclosed passage

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow stone passage flanked by high walls on both sides

notable_agents.action: worker sitting on the stone wall taking a break

entered.detail: tall stone block walls forming a narrow corridor on both sides
vertical wooden fence topping the stone wall on the left
lit oil lamps mounted on the right stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow stone corridor with high walls on both sides. The ground is now paved with large stone tiles. Wooden palisades top the left wall while hanging lanterns provide light on the right. Workers and guards are visible along the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open platform overlooking water with construction crane

events.description: exiting the stone corridor onto an open platform with panoramic water view
sun becomes visible over the water creating a bright lens flare and backlighting

agents.ego_description: walking to the platform edge to observe the water and distant landscape

notable_agents.action: worker operating the large wooden wheel mechanism near the platform edge

entered.detail: large timber crane wheel with ropes used for construction lifting
expansive view of calm water body reflecting sunlight
hazy mountain range visible across the water
palm trees lining the distant shoreline below the platform

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an open stone platform revealing a stunning panoramic view of a large body of water with distant mountains. A large wooden crane wheel stands near the edge where workers are operating machinery. The sun shines brightly over the water, creating a lens flare as the character approaches the platform edge overlooking palm trees and boats below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent from a rugged construction site up into a fortified stone outpost that opens onto a vast coastal vista. It begins on an arid, rocky hillside path flanked by wooden scaffolding and a white canvas tent, moving steadily toward a watchtower with a red canopy under the bright midday sun. As the character approaches the fortification gate, the loose dirt transitions into packed earth and stone walls adorned with red banners. The scene then shifts into a narrow, paved stone corridor lined with high walls and hanging lanterns before finally emerging onto an open stone platform. This final expansion reveals a panoramic view of a shimmering body of water and distant mountains, with a large wooden crane wheel standing near the edge where the sun creates a bright lens flare over the palm trees and boats below.
